summary: Live PR inventory shard classified conservatively. No shared canonical was invented. Close, merge, fix, post-merge close, and low-signal close paths are disabled for this job, so open non-security PRs are kept open for their existing proof/review paths. Security-sensitive linked refs are routed only as exact non-mutating quarantine items.

actions.reason: Keep open as an independent focused Slack/agent progress PR; no close, merge, or fix action is allowed or appropriate in this inventory job.
Keep open for author proof or maintainer review; close and fix paths are disabled and the item is not safely closable from this artifact.
Keep open as an independent docs PR; even though it has low-signal labels, this job did not enable low-signal closeout.
Keep open as an independent diagnostic PR pending proof/review; the artifact does not support duplicate, superseded, low-signal, or close classification.
Keep open as an independent outbound behavior PR pending real proof or maintainer decision; no close or replacement path is authorized.
Route exact security-sensitive linked ref to central OpenClaw security handling without poisoning unrelated non-security PR classifications.
Route exact security-sensitive linked ref to central OpenClaw security handling without affecting unrelated inventory PRs.
Route only the exact security-sensitive ref named by the security boundary summary; missing hydration prevents any more specific target classification.
